title: Hosted Checkout Credential
description: A reference-only credential for hosted checkout flows. Unlike card or token credentials, this credential contains no sensitive payment data and confers no payment authority. It is a correlation identifier enabling webhook-to-session binding between the payment provider and the business. The actual payment is processed entirely within the provider's hosted UI.

type.description: Credential type discriminator identifying this as a hosted checkout correlation reference.

session_id.description: The payment provider's session or order identifier. Used by the business to correlate incoming webhooks with the UCP checkout session. The specific format is provider-defined (e.g., Razorpay Order ID 'order_xyz789'). MUST NOT be treated as a payment token by the platform.
